mano_cua.result_summary: Pi-hole服务卡片Logo加载失败：图标区域显示alt文本'Pi-hole'而非实际Logo图像（broken image），其他卡片（Proxmox、Awesome app）图标均正常显示
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Pi-hole card icon area shows alt text 'Pi-hole' instead of actual logo image. This is standard browser behavior when image loading fails (broken image). Other service cards in the same group (Proxmox-Node1, An awesome app) display their icons normally. Pi-hole is the only card with broken icon.
